items.text:
WARSZAWA 19.05.2026r.
REKLAMA NAPOJU 

Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do soboty 9.05.2026r. do godz. 18:00.

Szukam do obsady 6 osób - ciekawych, charakterystycznych, od których bije ciepła energia.
- ROLA GŁÓWNA “MILLENIALSI”: kobiety i mężczyźni w wieku 30-45 lat do roli naturalnie empatycznych, ciepło uśmiechających się biesiadników.
- ROLA GŁÓWNA: GEN Z / „ZETKI”: kobiety i mężczyźni w wieku 18-30 lat (wiek: 18 - 25+) do ról osób o niespożytej energii, kreatywności i otwartości.
- ROLA GŁÓWNA: “SILVER GENERATION”: kobiety i mężczyźni w wieku 65-75 lat do roli życzliwej i pogodnej osoby o iskrzących oczach, od których bije wewnętrzny blask, życzliwość i pogoda ducha, która kocha ludzi i ma w sobie naturalną klasę połączoną z ogromnym dystansem do siebie.

Daty:
- 13.05 - recall
- 18.05 - przymiarki
- 19.05 - zdjęcia w Warszawie

Stawki:
- 1500 zł - dzień zdjęciowy + 3000 zł - prawa

Prawa rozpisane dokładnie w załączonym briefie:
- 4 miesiące, TV, kino, digital

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na adres: agata@podtytulem.pl, a w tytule wpisać NAPÓJ. 
Muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę jako link do YT, informację o doświadczeniu, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

W odpowiedzi na wybrane zgłoszenia prześlę scenkę do nagrania, prawa oraz link do formularza.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
Actors often turn their noses up at commercials but now, as the owner of a talent agency https://www.magnificenttalent.co.uk/ and a production company https://www.magnificentfilms.co.uk/ 
I can not stress enough how important they are for the survival of both actors and filmmakers. Here's one I did last year which paid a 5 figure sum for 4 hours work! Money like that helps you follow your real passion. Don't poo poo commercials. Get the job and take the money!! 🙏🎬❤XX

items.text:
CASTING CALL:
We are casting for 'Compression Test' coming to Durham Fringe Festival on the 1st and 2nd of August. 

It's the hottest day of the year.
The windows are open. The fan is blaring. The shorts are above the knee.
In a sweltering flat, a couple who once knew each other inside and out find themselves navigating unfamiliar territory. After coming out as trans masc, Andie has begun to change and Harriet is trying to keep up. As emotions run hot, conversations they’ve been ignoring become unavoidable.
This silly, sweaty, emotionally charged two-hander questions what happens when a relationship has melted beyond recognition - is love enough to salvage an entirely changed state?

First round auditions will be over selftape and second round will be held in person, please email 92beatstheatre@gmail.com with your CV and headshot for more information.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '92 BEATS PRODUCTIONS PRESENTS COMPRESSION TEST'

items.title: CASTING CALL:

items.text:
Hello,

I have a question about Mandy Backstage and StarNow. Do you think it’s still worth staying on those platforms and paying just to do unpaid projects? Because honestly, I’m starting to get fed up. I have to take time off from my day job, and it ends up being a waste of time and, more importantly, money. Especially since most of the time, their films never even get released, which is incredibly frustrating.

So my question is: is doing only student films a bit like doing background work, does it actually hold us back? Unfortunately, that’s all I have right now to try and get at least some visibility.

I give it my all. I reach out to lots of theatre companies, casting directors, I do training every year, I spend a fortune attending workshops, whether through agencies or schools, I’ve even updated my showreel… and still nothing works. And the worst part is, I’m very often offered background roles even though I’m auditioning for proper parts. Even my agent is struggling to find me work. So should I start asking myself the real question , should I give up?

If you have any advice, I’d really appreciate it.

Sorry if this message sounds a bit desperate, but I just can’t see the end of it.

Have a good night 💤

topComments.text: I can't comment on the platforms but just wanted to say that I thought about giving up many times. I did all the unpaid work, the workshops, the endless applications and juggled it all with the day job and slowly it built. Now I'm in my 50s and am still juggling but now I'm juggling 2 TV jobs (one of them a big Netflix thing), catsitters, flights etc. It was worth sticking at it for me. Everyone has their own story but I just wanted to send encouragement.
Honestly mate, I’ve had more success from Facebook posts and Casting Callback than Backstage.

items.summary:
Hello,

I have a question about Mandy Backstage and StarNow. Do you think it’s still worth staying on those platforms and paying just to do unpaid projects? Because honestly, I’m starting to get fed up. I have to take time off from my day job, and it ends up being a waste of time and, more importantly, money. Especially since most of the time, their films never even get released, which is incredibly frustrating.

So my question is: is doing only student films a bit like doing background work, does it actually hold us back? Unfortunately, that’s all I have right now to try and get at least some visibility.

I give it my all. I reach out to lots of theatre companies, casting directors, I do training every year, I spend a fortune attending workshops, whether through agencies or schools, I’ve even updated my showreel… and still nothing works. And the worst part is, I’m very often offered background roles even though I’m auditioning for proper parts. Even my agent is struggling to find me work. So should I start asking myself the real question , should I give up?

If you have any advice, I’d really appreciate it.

Sorry if this message sounds a bit desperate, but I just can’t see the end of it.

Have a good night 💤
items.title: Hello,

items.text:
Acteur kind (3-5) gezocht voor Comercial 
Hallo! 

Voor een examencommercial over prestatiedruk onder moeders zijn wij op zoek naar acteurs die willen meewerken aan een warm en betekenisvol verhaal rondom “sisterhood”.

Opnamedatum: 8 mei

Locatie: Amsterdam (voorkeur voor acteurs uit Amsterdam i.v.m. planning)

Wij zoeken:

• Kind (3–5 jaar)

Het project is een schoolopdracht, dus er is helaas geen vergoeding. Wel bieden wij:

• Reiskostenvergoeding

• Goede catering

• Een leuke en professionele setervaring

• Een mooie bijdrage aan een maatschappelijk relevant onderwerp

• Gebruik van het beeldmateriaal voor je reel/CV

Interesse of ken je iemand?

Stuur een mail naar: desairly.cijntje@student.ahk.nl 

We kijken uit naar jullie reacties!

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS ORGANIZING AN OPEN CALL IN SEARCH OF BODY DOUBLES FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN 

IF YOU MATCH ONE OF THE SPECS LISTED BELOW, YOU’LL RECEIVE $50.00 CAD FOR YOUR TIME ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6. 

IF YOU’RE CONFIRMED FOR THE JOB, COMPENSATION WILL BE $400.00 CAD FOR THE REHEARSAL DAY (MAY 8 OR 9***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR BOTH DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE) & $1200.00 CAD FOR THE SHOOT DAY (MAY 10 TO 12***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR ALL DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE). 

YOU MUST MATCH ONE OF THE ROLES BELOW TO RECEIVE THE $50.00 CAD AUDITION FEE

IF YOU FIT & ARE FULLY AVAILABLE FOR THE DATES, PLEASE COME TO REVIVAL STUDIOS (Revival Studios, Building E, 629 Eastern Ave, Toronto) 
ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6 BETWEEN from 10:00AM UNTIL 5:00PM 

TALENT NEEDS TO BE AVAILABLE FOR MAY 8, 9, 10, 11 & 12)

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR…

1)
FEMALE 
WHITE
5’4” TO 5’6” IN HEIGHT
HIGH LEVEL SOCCER PLAYER ABLE TO DO KICK-UPS, FREESTYLE & AROUND-THE-WORLD. YOU MUST BE ABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THESE SKILLS ON-CAMERA. 

2)
MALE
BLACK
5’9” TO 5’12” IN HEIGHT 
SOFTER BUILD

3)
MALE
WHITE
5’8” TO 5’10” IN HEIGHT 
SLIGHT BUILD

items.text:
‼️GO-GO GIRLS WANTED 💃
🇦🇪DUBAI

🔶Club Job

🔸4-5 sets per evening, 15-25 minutes each (depending on the club that accepts you)

🔸2 days off per month

🔸There is a champagne presentation, which adds 10% to your salary (depending on the club that accepts you)

🔸Working hours from 10:30 to 3:30 

🔸Contract from 3 months

🔷EMPLOYER PROVIDES

🔹Visa (work permit)

🔹Flight

🔹Apartment

🔹Two meals a day

💰Salary - from $900+ 10-15% of the champagne presentation fee (depending on the club that approves you)

‼️ NO CONSULT

💰Salary - from $1,200-$1,600

🫶We look forward to collaborating

items.text:
CASTING: HOST (Social Media Presenter)
We’re looking for a charismatic female host for long-term collaboration 🙏✨

Format:

Host/presenter for:

-Instagram Stories

-Instagram channel / Reels

-Telegram channel

Responsibilities:

-Recording videos based on scripts

-Announcements

-Behind-the-scenes content

-Lifestyle content / audience interaction

Requirements:

-Female, 18–30

-Attractive appearance, well-groomed

-Confident on camera, charismatic, with lively energy

-Clear diction and a pleasant voice

Languages:

-Fluent Russian

-English (preferably without a strong accent)

On-camera experience is a plus (blogging, hosting, acting)

Collaboration format:

-Regular shoots

-Long-term contract

-Work based on content plans and scripts

If you’re interested, send me a DM 🙏

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

topComments.text: Hatte ich oben vergessen: Drehorte, die infrage kommen, sind entweder Berlin oder die Region um Bayreuth, an einem Wochenende im August oder September (genauer Termin steht noch nicht).

items.text:
Hope everyone in the group is doing well.
We are a London-based production team with experience across both the private and public sectors. We specialise in event filming, commercial shoots, and a wide range of video production services, using Netflix-approved camera equipment to deliver high-quality results.

Our in-house studio in Wandsworth, South West London, is also available for podcast recordings and live shows. The studio is fully equipped with an ATEM switcher and a variety of other camera bodies designed for multi-camera productions.

We are always open to new collaborations and production opportunities. If you have a project in mind or would like to discuss working together, please send us a direct message.

Many thanks.

items.text:
New to the acting and modelling world and now actively looking for opportunities across the UK.

Recently had these professional headshots done and I’m currently available for:
• Commercial modelling
• TV and film extras work
• Character and dramatic roles
• Lifestyle and mature modelling
• Promotional and social media campaigns
• Music videos and brand shoots

I bring a confident on-camera presence, strong life experience, professionalism, reliability, and a versatile look that can range from sharp commercial/corporate to gritty dramatic character roles.

Based in the UK and willing to travel for the right projects.

Open to:
• Agencies seeking new faces
• Casting calls
• Collaborations with photographers and creatives
• Independent film and TV opportunities

If anyone has advice, recommendations, or genuine opportunities, I’d really appreciate hearing from you.

Headshots attached below. Thanks for looking.

items.text: What could Learn from this?

sharedPost.text:
It’s just a basketball — but the meaning runs deep. 

Yes, the journey brings pain. You’ll lose confidence in yourself. People will doubt you and won’t believe in you. But with consistency, perseverance, and putting God first, nothing is impossible.

Watch the reactions at the end. 

Thank you all for the birthday wishes.

items.text:
Professional headshots just uploaded to the group.

Experienced, confident, mature look with a strong screen presence — open to acting, modelling, presenter work, commercials, character roles, lifestyle campaigns, and collaboration opportunities.

Based in Yorkshire and available for projects across the UK.

Always interested in connecting with:
• Casting directors
• Photographers
• Creative agencies
• Film makers
• Other actors and models

Feel free to connect, share, or message regarding suitable opportunities.

#Actor #Model #Headshots #Casting #UKActor #Yorkshire #MaleModel #CommercialModel #CharacterActor #Film #TV #CreativeIndustry #Talent #Leeds #Manchester #Photoshoot

sharedPost.text:
New to the acting and modelling world and now actively looking for opportunities across the UK.

Recently had these professional headshots done and I’m currently available for:
• Commercial modelling
• TV and film extras work
• Character and dramatic roles
• Lifestyle and mature modelling
• Promotional and social media campaigns
• Music videos and brand shoots

I bring a confident on-camera presence, strong life experience, professionalism, reliability, and a versatile look that can range from sharp commercial/corporate to gritty dramatic character roles.

Based in the UK and willing to travel for the right projects.

Open to:
• Agencies seeking new faces
• Casting calls
• Collaborations with photographers and creatives
• Independent film and TV opportunities

If anyone has advice, recommendations, or genuine opportunities, I’d really appreciate hearing from you.

Headshots attached below. Thanks for looking.

items.text:
Hey!  Casting for an indie vertical series called The Simp and the thot.
Shooting it mid July in LA.  Paid.  

Looking for Australian actresses ages 22 to 65.   

Particularly for the lead character of Winnie.  

Looking for an actress who can bring a geeky charm to the part.  

Also looking for the lead character of Oliver Owens. (25 to 40). Looking for somebody who can handle a mix of comedy and sincerity.  

If this seems like something you can do reach out.
items.title: Evan Camacho | Actor, Second Unit Director or Assistant Director

topComments.text: Very interested in Oliver Owen - https://m.imdb.com/name/nm6801554/

items.text:
So you want to book commercials but have no idea where to start? We've got you!! 😅
Our A-Z Commercial Class walks you through everything from nailing your audition to showing up confident on set. Multiple industry-experienced instructors each bring their own expertise so you're getting well-rounded training that covers every angle of the commercial world.

Grab your spot today: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes#a-z-commercial-acting

#CommercialActing #ActingClass #Acting

items.text:
# **Executive Producer** looking to connect with writers who want to tell more Latin American stories. 🎬

We already have crew, equipment, and locations ready to help bring the right 5–10 minute proof of concept to life. Also looking for directors — if you write + direct, that’s a huge plus.

This is bigger than one short film. The goal is to build real creative teams around strong storytellers so we can continue creating together long-term.

If you have a concept you’ve been sitting on, comment the logline below and I’ll reach out from there.

items.text:
TEATRO da TERRA estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

7 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

items.text:
How do you feel about learning through the teacher called Play?  

Sethmichaelmay.com
Insta @sethmichaelmaystudios

#play #innerchild #adultplay 

https://fs.blog/learning-through-play/?fbclid=IwRlRTSARohE9leHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZAo2NjI4NTY4Mzc5AAEex1Jey2UNt-Z9wN-IVJDXobYoy-I_dCYdxEBa5qFcaP3nDzZ2o7z_Qc2gxiE_aem_-5jrknNa4Hyqpts1arOwFg
items.previewDescription: Play is an essential way of learning about the world. Doing things we enjoy without a goal in mind leads us to find new information, better understand our own capabilities, and find unexpected beauty around us. Arithmetic is one example of an area we can explore through play.
items.title: Learning Through Play

sharedPost.text: Liebe Leute ich benötige eure Hilfe. Vergesst bitte für einen kurzen Moment dass ihr bessere Musiker seid, bessere Texte schreibt, besser singt oder ganz einfach besser ausseht. Bitte votet für mich! Ich danke euch 😉

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

sharedPost.text:
New to the acting and modelling world and now actively looking for opportunities across the UK.

Recently had these professional headshots done and I’m currently available for:
• Commercial modelling
• TV and film extras work
• Character and dramatic roles
• Lifestyle and mature modelling
• Promotional and social media campaigns
• Music videos and brand shoots

I bring a confident on-camera presence, strong life experience, professionalism, reliability, and a versatile look that can range from sharp commercial/corporate to gritty dramatic character roles.

Based in the UK and willing to travel for the right projects.

Open to:
• Agencies seeking new faces
• Casting calls
• Collaborations with photographers and creatives
• Independent film and TV opportunities

If anyone has advice, recommendations, or genuine opportunities, I’d really appreciate hearing from you.

Headshots attached below. Thanks for looking.

MEISNER INTENSIVE FOR ACTORS♥️

Casting Models! 

✨ ON THE SPOT LIGHT ✨ @sienamay_official 

Introducing the beautiful and talented Siena May Tulloch from the United Kingdom 🇬🇧 featured by Matilda Model Magazine.
📸 Model: Siena May Tulloch
📱 Instagram: @sienamay_official
🎂 12 Years Old
📍 United Kingdom
📷 Photography: Dani Geddes
Siena May, 12, from Kent, UK, brings a vibrant and creative energy wherever she goes, paired with a natural flair in front of the camera. With a confident presence and expressive style, she effortlessly captures attention in every photoshoot.
Beyond modeling, Siena enjoys swimming and spending quality time with family and friends. She has a deep love for animals and a unique creative passion for designing Halloween makeup looks, where her imagination truly shines.
With her lively personality and artistic spirit, Siena is a rising young talent with a bright future in the world of fashion and creativity. ✨ She is featured in Matilda Magazine for Models & Talents all ages and all around the globe. @matildamodelmagazine available in our website www.mylittlematilda.net

items.text:
Hey everyone not sure if this is the right place to post but I shall give it a go 🙈 I am so interested in the industry the filming the cameras the casting and recently decided to take the leap to learn more about it. Looking at courses to gain more knowledge. Is there anywhere or anyone I can go to to volunteer for on set to gain experience or watch how it all works etc I don’t want paying I just have plenty of time on my hands and passionate to learn. I have seen a couple of intern things or places that maybe good but they ask for ages 18-25 🙈 I am more mature at the age of 42 🤯🤣 thanks x
Can travel within the north west regions

topComments.text: Drop me a PM, looking for general helping hands on a new feature and can give some hands on advice and experience if I can!

items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text: First THURSDAY CLASS FREE! 😱😮🤯

sharedPost.text:
Born to boogie!? 🤔 WE WERE! 🙌

Monday & Thursday evenings, come and get active with us. New routines every few weeks, taught at a slow, manageable pace. No pressure, just good vibes. 🙌

Thursdays 7-8pm. Try your first class FREE! 😃

Prefer a Monday session? 6.30-7.30pm. (First class £3)

DM for more info and to book in!

#goodvibesalways #TryItFree #feelgoodmusic #GetActiveNow #exercise

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 19/2026

GESCHICHTSUNTERRICHT, JAMES CAMERON GOES POP UND VERSCHWUNDENE KINOS

Vor 80 Jahren fanden die Nürnberger Strafprozesse statt. Das starbesetzte Historiendrama NÜRNBERG beleuchtet diese ganz speziell.

James Cameron revolutionierte die 3D Technik,  tauchte hinab zum Wrack der Titanic. Nun setzt er neue Maßstäbe gemeinsam mit Billie Eilish.

Die Hochblütezeit der Kinos war von 1950 bis Mitte der 1970er. Danach verschwanden immer mehr Kinos auf der niederösterreichischen Landkarte.  Unsere Moderatorin sprach mit Autor Karl Zellhofer über dieses Phänomen.

Musikalisch gibts diesmal ein best of der bekanntesten Filmsongs der letzten 80 Jahre. 

Mittwoch 6.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION COMMERCIAL**

Novel Productions is casting **three roles** for a 1**5-second commercial** for Applewood Auto Group.

**Shoot Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 19, 2026 (3-10 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** $600-1000 (Including buyout)

**ROLES:**

• **Customer** — Age **35–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Used Car Salesman** — Age **45–55** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Applewood Sales Rep** — Age **35–55** | Gender & ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Applewood Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

Usage will be in perpetuity. Additional usage details will be provided to selected talent.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text:
Wow....1000 bucks for a role " in perpetuity "    thereby mitigating ANY other car commercials one could do.....
Here's where a good agent advises you to think first.

items.text:
I'm looking for Korean hip hop dances (K-dance) in Vancouver for a proof-of-concept pitch video.

Can be male or female, ideally the dancer is also an actor and can speak Korean (language). Dancers can be any ethnicity. Looking for great, sharp dancers (think Noze, Narae Kim, etc...) and is able to learn choreography from video.

This is to pitch a drama episodic series/webseries as a co-production with Korea.

If interested, send your photos (headshoot and full body), resume and any video you have to Ronald at castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. Further details shared with shortlisted applicants.

Thank you for reading!

sharedPost.text:
Złap dobrą energię i wpadaj na casting! 🛒

Hej!🤍
Zapraszam do udziału w castingu dla znanej sieci sklepów spożywczych!

Atrakcyjna stawka!💸

KOGO SZUKAMY?🍀

1. PAKER (18-33 lata) – kulturyści, ale też po prostu umięśnieni, postawni mężczyźni.

2. CHŁOPAK NORMALS (18-27 lat) – młody, sympatyczny, szczupły, wątły, zabawny (musi wyglądać na 20 lat)

3. 3. DZIEWCZYNA BLOKERS (18-27 lat) – lekko „dresiarska”, epizod mówiony

 Scenki nie są obowiązkowe ale bardzo mile widziane.

 Sceny do nagrania:
PAKER: Robisz popisówkę swoich mięśni i formy sportowej do kamery. Po chwili orientujesz się że po drugiej stronie jest twój przeciwnik. Więc prężysz mięśnie jak przed pojedynkiem.

CHŁOPAK NORMALS: Siedzisz na ławeczce. Podrzucasz sobie kapsel na totalnym chilluu. Chwilę na chilli właśnie sobie go podrzucasz. W pewnym momencie zauważasz że jeśli wypada jedna strona to wygrywasz. Radość z wygranej!

DZIEWCZYNA BLOKERS: Sama wizytówka.

💌
Zgłoszenia do 09.05 (do godz. 18)

CASTING@UNAGIMEDIA.PL

Realizacja zdjęć: 19.05 w Warszawie

Przypominamy, że kompletne zgłoszenie zawiera: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, telefon kontaktowy, wyraźne zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki + video wizytówka i scenka

Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie! 🥰
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting044/

sharedPost.text:
Wpadaj na casting i pokaż swoje wnętrze!🏡

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla branży meblarskiej!🍀

Kogo szukamy?✨
Nie szukamy „ideału”. Zależy nam na pewnego rodzaju niedoskonałości (różne typy sylwetek, pryszcze, okulary, piegi itp)
*Kobiety i mężczyźni - wiek 30-40 lat - różne typy urody - wiarygodni w roli rodzica.
*Chłopcy i dziewczynka - wiek 6-12 lat - dla chłopców są role zarówno mówione jak i nie.
*Nastolatek - wiek 13-16 lat

🗓️Timing:
Termin wysyłania zgłoszeń: 12.05 do godz 22:00

Realizacja zdjęć: dni do potwierdzenia, konieczna dyspozycyjność w każdy z wymienionych dni 3.06.26 / 24.06.26 / 30.06.26 / 01.07.26

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka po polsku : koniecznie dodaj emocje : strach, złość, zdziwienie, radość, duma + nagranie sceny

✨SCENKI DO NAGRANIA:
DZIECI i NASTOLATKOWIE - robią tylko wizytówki
PANOWIE i PANIE - scenki + wizytówki

Link do castingu⬇️
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting043/

items.text:
Hey guys, just thought I'd share this new side-hustle for social butterflies, paid at £30/hr.

We are looking for chatty people to record at our studio in Bermondsey! It's a 7 minute walk from Bermondsey tube station, which is one stop from London Bridge or 3 from Waterloo so it's very easy to get to.

You will be recording in a booth, talking to another participant for 2h + 30min briefing and breaks, so it's a total £75 per session.

Since the recording is used to teach an AI model about human interactions, the only requirement is for you to be as expressive as possible. Your face and voice will not be cloned or used for anything other than model training.

There really isn't a catch, we just need friendly people to have an energetic chat to help build our research dataset. To learn more and book a slot:

https://aloestudioslondon.com/?source=6QgjyagTZKwo8DQVnorW

items.text:
HE SURVIVED THE IMPOSSIBLE

Damian Cross stands where history stopped making sense.
A city turned into rubble, fire, and silence.

Rain falls through smoke like broken judgment.
Every drop hits the ground like a memory refusing to die.

He carries a shattered helmet under one arm.
Not as protection… but as proof.

Proof that he was there when everything collapsed.
And still didn’t fall with it.

Burning debris lights the ruins in unstable flashes.
Like the battlefield is still deciding who won.

His armor is cracked, heavy, and barely holding together.
But so is everything else around him.

Exhaustion lives in his bones… not his will.
Because will is the only thing still intact.

Every breath feels like a negotiation with survival.
Every step feels like refusing surrender.

Some wars don’t end when the guns go silent.
They end when the last soldier forgets his name.

Damian Cross hasn’t forgotten anything.
That’s why he’s still standing.

The radio is dead. Commands are gone.
Only static and distant fire remain.

Yet he moves forward anyway.
Not because he’s ordered to… but because he can’t stop.

Behind him: collapse. Ahead: unknown.
But standing still is not an option he believes in.

Flames reflect in his tired eyes.
Not fear… recognition.

He knows what war takes.
And what it never gives back.

But even in ruin… he endures.
Because survival is not victory… it’s punishment.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'HE SURVIVED THE IMPOSSIBLE BUT WAR NEVER LETS YOU GO'

Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

items.title: Hello all,

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO ETIUDY STUDENCKIEJ
Do realizacji etiudy studenckiej Katowickiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy statystów oraz osób do małych ról epizodycznych.

📍 Miejsce zdjęć; Katowice i okolice

🗓️ Termin planu zdjęciowego: 20–25 lipca

Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn w różnym wieku– od młodych dorosłych po osoby starsze.

W projekcie przewidziane są także krótkie role epizodyczne 

Jest to projekt non-profit jednak jest to idealna szansa na zdobycie doświadczenia i pracy w przyjaznej atmosferze 

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem, prześlij:

* imię i nazwisko

* wiek

* kilka zdjęć

* numer telefonu

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy kierować na maila:

atomaszewska297@gmail.com

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

items.text:
Hej! Szukam sales managera.

Wynajmujemy kamery, obiektywy, oświetlenie i akcesoria fotografom, 

videografom, agencjom i produkcjom. Klienci wracają do nas latami, 

bo nie sprzedajemy "transakcji" — budujemy relacje.

Szukam kogoś, kto lubi kontakt z ludźmi, rozumie kreatywną branżę 

i potrafi zamienić rozmowę w sprzedaż.

Profil: 2–4 lata doświadczenia w sprzedaży B2B/B2C, najlepiej z tłem 

w produkcji, fotografii lub eventach. Polski native/C1, gotowy/a 

na osobiste spotkania z klientami, biuro w Warszawie.

Wynagrodzenie ~10k brutto.

Jeśli kogoś takiego znasz — podeślij kontakt lub otaguj. Za skuteczne 

polecenie (po okresie próbnym) — 1000 PLN ode mnie. Dzięki!

items.text:
WROCŁAW // TRUDNE SPRAWY 
Dzień dobry, cześć!

Do serialu "Trudne Sprawy" poszukuję aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

❗UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane; widełki wiekowe są OSTATECZNE❗

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK), 15.05 (PIĄTEK), 16.05 (SOBOTA)

TYMON Kalinowski (24 -30 lat) – kierowca w firmie logistycznej.

Wygląd: Atrakcyjny, inteligentny młody człowiek. Ubiera się wygodnie, młodzieżowo, sportowo. Poznajemy go po wypadku. We wszystkich scenach w szpitalu i jego okolicach chodzi z ortezą na nodze i bandażem na głowie.

Szczegóły: Miły, trochę naiwny, podejrzliwy i nieśmiały. Powoli zakochuje się w Judycie (głównej bohaterce).

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK), 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

TOMASZ Zalewski (25 - 32 lata) – były chłopak Judyty, analityk finansowy.

Wygląd: Chudy, w okularach. Ubiera się surowo, w ciemne kolory, najczęściej w biznesowe garnitury biurowe.

Szczegóły: Fałszywy, nieszczery, dwulicowy. Ukrywa związek z Amelią przed Judytą.

❗PONIŻEJ TYLKO OSOBY Z WROCŁAWIA LUB NAJBLIŻSZEJ OKOLICY❗ 

🗓️ 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

HELENA Cieplak (60 - 70 lat) – matka Judyty.Wygląd: Odrobinę większa, uprzejma, dobroduszna, powolna, nosi okulary.

Szczegóły: Ubiera się w wygodne ubrania i nosi biżuterię. Kocha córkę, martwi się o nią i troszczy, żyje jej życiem i często udziela rad. Dobrze gotuje. Utrzymuje dom w czystości i porządku.

🗓️ 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

AMELIA (23 - 28 lat) – dziewczyna Tomasza.

Wygląd: dowolny

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA)

JADWIGA Góra (22 - 28 lat) – koleżanka Judyty.

Wygląd: Dowolny. We wszystkich scenach szpitalnych ubrana jest w specjalistyczne ubrania.

Szczegóły: Pielęgniarka w tym samym szpitalu co Judyta. Impulsywna, przyjaźni się z Judytą.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KAMILA Głowacka (22 - 27 lat) – dziewczyna Tymona.

Wygląd: Bystra, odważna, arogancka, atrakcyjna. Krucha i chuda. Nosi mocny, prowokujący makijaż. Chodzi w nowoczesnych, młodzieżowych ubraniach.

Szczegóły: Chce rzucić Tymona i powiedzieć mu to w szpitalu zaraz po wypadku.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KONRAD Janiak (40 - 50 lat) – traumatolog i lekarz prowadzący Tymona.

Wygląd: Inteligentnie wyglądający mężczyzna w okularach. Ubrany w specjalistyczne ubrania w szpitalu.

Szczegóły: Profesjonalista w swojej dziedzinie, uważny, wrażliwy, życzliwy, dostrzega sumienność Judyty i pomaga jej znaleźć zatrudnienie.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla ról: TYMON, TOMASZ zapewniamy nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1374 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

❗Nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Messengerze❗

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

HELENA Cieplak (60 - 70 lat) – matka Judyty.Wygląd: Odrobinę większa, uprzejma, dobroduszna, powolna, nosi okulary.

Szczegóły: Ubiera się w wygodne ubrania i nosi biżuterię. Kocha córkę, martwi się o nią i troszczy, żyje jej życiem i często udziela rad. Dobrze gotuje. Utrzymuje dom w czystości i porządku.

🗓️ 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

AMELIA (23 - 28 lat) – dziewczyna Tomasza.

Wygląd: dowolny

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA)

JADWIGA Góra (22 - 28 lat) – koleżanka Judyty.

Wygląd: Dowolny. We wszystkich scenach szpitalnych ubrana jest w specjalistyczne ubrania.

Szczegóły: Pielęgniarka w tym samym szpitalu co Judyta. Impulsywna, przyjaźni się z Judytą.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KAMILA Głowacka (22 - 27 lat) – dziewczyna Tymona.

Wygląd: Bystra, odważna, arogancka, atrakcyjna. Krucha i chuda. Nosi mocny, prowokujący makijaż. Chodzi w nowoczesnych, młodzieżowych ubraniach.

Szczegóły: Chce rzucić Tymona i powiedzieć mu to w szpitalu zaraz po wypadku.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KONRAD Janiak (40 - 50 lat) – traumatolog i lekarz prowadzący Tymona.

Wygląd: Inteligentnie wyglądający mężczyzna w okularach. Ubrany w specjalistyczne ubrania w szpitalu.

Szczegóły: Profesjonalista w swojej dziedzinie, uważny, wrażliwy, życzliwy, dostrzega sumienność Judyty i pomaga jej znaleźć zatrudnienie.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla ról: TYMON, TOMASZ zapewniamy nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1374 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

❗Nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Messengerze❗

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)
Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:

• Approaching people

• Asking fun / engaging questions

• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:

• 2–3 hour shoot

• £80–£100 paid

• London location

Ideal for:

• Drama students

• Aspiring presenters

• Content creators

Must have:

• Strong energy

• Natural speaking style

• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:

Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Casting is now open for the role of YOUNGER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

YOUNGER, is a 13 year old boy with a passion, basketball. We are looking for a young boy with a lot of energy and sensibility. 

If you play/have played basketball (or not but willing to learn more) we want to hear from you! 

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a recent picture of you, where you are based, a brief description and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you, 

One Too Many Productions

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

items.text:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!

items.text: Hello everyone! I'm excited to be part of this group. I've been a performer since I was a child and I am an acting and performance coach. I hold workshops in the Aurora and Parker areas. In fact I have four seats left in a 5-hour intensive that I am offering this weekend, on Saturday the 9th.  I also provide private one-on-one and onset acting coaching, wherever that takes me. I'm terrible at networking and I want to expand my professional circle in the industry. DM me for more info on the intensive.

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

topComments.text: 🤣"⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst". Der Witz in Spraydosen. Zahlt die Leute!

Bringing Every Beat to Life with Passion & Precision

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny w Tawernie

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 11 i 12 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: Rynia nad Zegrzem

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 
Temat wiadomości: TAWERNA

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– aktualne zdjęcie (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

items.text:
Announcing our first Demidov Three Month Online Immersion Course! 🎭👩🏻‍💻🎉

This Three Month Immersion is for actors who want to dive more deeply into the work of the Demidov School. The course – held entirely on Zoom – is ideal for actors who do not have ready access to our studio for in person courses. It gives actors the opportunity to work more intensively and in greater depth on certain aspects of the Demidov curriculum. The course will include working with the Foundations of the entire technique, rooted in Demidov’s signature Etudes, plus Inexact (Creative) Repetition, The Power of Circumstances, and his unique approach to the development of Character. The course is structured to flow seamlessly from one aspect of the work to the next, allowing actors to stay immersed in the work and organically utilise what they are learning as the course progresses.

Click the link 🔗 below to for more information, including course structure, dates/ times, and how to apply!

[https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/courses/demidov-three-month-online-immersion-course-septdec26](https://www.demidovstudiolondon.com/courses/demidov-three-month-online-immersion-course-septdec26)

Photo by 📸: @kmj_theatre_photography

~
Demidov Studio London
The UK’s only certified Demidov Acting School
Located at Pushkin House, 5a Bloomsbury Square, London WC1A 2TA
demidovstudiolondon.com
All classes and courses taught by studio Founder & Director @andrei_biziorek

#actor #acting #londonactors #actortraining #demidov

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'The TheUK's UK's only certified Demidov DemidovActing Acting School Demidov Organic Acting Technique Three Month Online Immersion Course with Andrei Biziorek September December 2026 All Sessions Online via Zoom Visit www.demidovstudiolondon.com for more information.'

items.text: Hey Friends! I'm a Casting Producer on a returning hit Kid's TV show and we are looking for dynamic teams of kid bakers ages 8-13! If you have skilled little bakers in your life, apply today cause we'd love to meet them.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Food Network is looking for the most talented TEAMS of SIBLINGS, COUSINS AND FRIENDS to compete to be the best BAKERS in the country! Do you think your kids were born to bake? Well if so, this is the perfect show for them! We are looking for kids between the ages of 8-14 who want to put their baking skills to the ultimate test! APPLY NOW! BAKINGCHAMPIONSHIP.COM *only subm submissions sent by parents will be accepted.'

topComments.text: Do they have to be skilled by y'all's standards or their standards? 🤣 My daughter would love to come and try but idk how it's gonna go

👀 I see so many posts on my feed of parents looking for online classes for their home ed child, so I just wanted to tell you about a ***new provision we offer***! 🙌🏼✨

As well as booking individual subjects, you can now save some money by booking one of our packages! 📦📚

We have the following options available...
⭐️ **Starter Package** (English, maths & science) - £84 per month
⭐️ **Core Package** (English, maths, science, history & geography) - £130 per month
⭐️ **Expansion Package** (geography, history & world explorers) - £84 per month
⭐️ **GCSE Package** (English language, English literature, maths & science) - £150 per month

Available for KS1 up to GCSE support, and everything in between! 
Save up to 15% by booking as a package 😌
SEN/neurodivergent friendly 🌈
A subject can be switched out for a different subject if needed 🔀

Would anyone like a bit more info? 😊
Kind regards,
Aimee 
Swan Tutoring

items.text:
Hello all! I'm producing the first chapter of a fantasy audiobook and looking to fill three major roles. We are looking for actors that would be willing to continue performing throughout the project. Because we record in a sound booth with a small crew, set days are flexible and easy to schedule around work. Pay is small for this first chapter, since it isn't dialogue-heavy, but that will change for later chapters.

Here is the project pitch deck: https://www.ameliarinehartbooks.com/

Title: The Gods Of Blood And Honey

Genre: Audiobook, fantasy

Logline: Under cover of night in a spirit-infested swamp, an assassin and a sorcerer meet over a corpse. One wants to be king, and he wants the other's help.

Roles: 

Zajeira (female 20s, Black) 

Lazhan (male 20s, Black) 

Amur (male 20s-30s, any)

Other roles will be needed as the project progresses, so even if you don't fit these three, we might need you for later chapters.

Production Company: Paper Bird Entertainment

Production Type: Audiobook

Run Time: Single chapter, approx. 20 mins

Compensation: $1 per line rounded up to the nearest $5. For details about line counts for specific roles, please reference the pitch deck linked above. Can also provide audio samples for you to use in your reels.

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Auditions will be done over the phone

Shooting Schedule: Between the 18th and the 22nd, flexible to everyone's schedule.

Filming Location: Community College of Aurora, Lowry Studios voice recording booth

Project Description: This audiobook will be produced and distributed chapter by chapter, so is a long-term project with great flexibility for scheduling.

Please fill out the form below. Thank you for your time!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1gq6VJQ_J8LKWMKlezWeTlzYV6h9zzU9ckzJ75teh94uUzw/viewform?usp=dialog

“THE MIDNIGHT AFTER PROM”

"Prom Night in the quiet town of Richwood Pines takes a deadly turn when something deep beneath the streets turns a night of teenage revelry into a blood-soaked hunt for survival"

Roles:

Jonathan Bennett (Male, 30-60)
Emily's father, stern but kind. A loving husband and proud father.  It's Prom Night, and he's worried that his daughter might be going down the wrong path.

Mindy Bennett (Female, 30-60)
Emily's mother and a loving wife. Raised her daughter like her mother raised her. Emily has always been a good kid, but tonight is Prom, and anything could happen.

EXPEDITED SCHEDULE: Shooting occurs tomorrow, Friday May 8.

🎬 What You Get:
•$20 for 2 hours
• IMDb credit
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

Send headshot + contact info to: midnightafterprom@gmail.com

items.text:
Casting Call – Vancouver Laser & Skin Care Centre
Hi everyone!

We are currently casting **one female talent** for a series of educational videos for our new website.

## **Role Needed**
* **Role:** Female talent
* **Age:** 30-50
* **Ethnicity:** Caucasian
* **Language:** Native-level English fluency
* **Preferred (not required):** Experience filming educational, corporate, or introduction-style videos

## **Project Details**
* **Deliverables: **25 videos (approx. 1 minute each)
* **Shoot Duration:** 3 - 4 hours (approx.)
* **Shoot Date:** One day between **May 6 – 15** (Exact date can be discussed)
* **Wardrobe & Makeup:** Not provided. Please wear light-colored business-casual attire.

## **Compensation**
* **$1,000 flat rate**
* **Snacks & coffee provided**

## **How to Apply**

Please email the following to **ben@vancouverlaser.com **

**Subject line:** *Website Video + [Your Name]*

**Please include:**
* Recent headshot taken within the last 6 months
* Resume
* Demo videos (if available)

**Please note: Facebook DMs will not be accepted.**

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
We look forward to your submissions!

Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for:

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 30-49

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

items.text:
Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media co oznacza, że szukamy nowych aktorów! Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

Zgłoszenia dla osób z ***CAŁEJ POLSKI:***

Gabriela Jarosz (wiek kandydatki 40-45 lat) – koleżanka Igora.

6 scen

Dni nagrań: 17-19.05

Wygląd: szczupła, zadbana, modna, zalotna, uśmiechnięta. Mówi powoli i zalotnie. Modnie się ubiera

i nosi modną fryzurę.

Szczegóły: Główna księgowa firmy budowlanej głównego bohatera. Singielka, sama wychowuje córkę. Wytrwała, przedsiębiorcza.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule "Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1381 oraz 1383 + IMIĘ postaci" wraz z:
* **aktualnymi** zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki,
* wiekiem,
* wzrostem i wagą,
* numerem telefonu,
* materiałami video z odcinków, w których występowałeś/aś (jeżeli grałeś/aś w przeszłości),
* wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie, w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby).

na maila julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej na Facebooku.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach, w podanym przedziale wiekowym.

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING A LEAD ROLE ON A NETFLIX SHOW AT 18
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 and went from having no connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA, and booking a series regular on a Netflix show within three months.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see is the years of hard work and the clear strategy behind every move I made to move me forward. 

Lately, I have been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS WHO ARE FEELING STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO MOVE FORWARD 

You train.
You get your materials together.
You are told “get an agent.”

But then…
You get an agent and nothing happens
Or you do not have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A 2 hour, 1 to 1 personalised career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill an actor must have to book work, and how to assess if you truly have it (hint: it’s not talent) 
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t have an agent, and how to actively work toward getting one
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions 
• What to do if you’re auditioning a lot but not booking (the key most actors miss)
• The materials you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to expand opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

YOU LEAVE WITH A PERSONALISED PLAN TO BRIDGE THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE AND WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO, PLUS THE EXACT STRATEGY I USED TO GO FROM UNKNOWN TO WORKING ACTOR.

Also included are the specialised tools I created for actors to keep a clear track of their progress. 

If this resonates, comment ACTING below or send me a DM 🤗

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

items.text:
**OPEN AUDITIONS (GLASGOW): GOD OF CARNAGE BY YASMINA REZA**

The Antonine Theatre Group is looking for four actors to join us for our summer production of God of Carnage, Yasmina Reza’s Tony and Olivier Award-winning comedy.

> Two sets of parents meet to discuss a playground fight between their sons. What begins as a civilised conversation unravels into one of the funniest, sharpest portraits of adult behaviour in modern theatre. It is a brilliantly written play with four substantial roles, and a real treat to perform.

If you have been thinking about getting back on stage, trying something new, or just want a creative project to throw yourself into over the summer, we’d love to hear from you. Rehearsals are sociable, the company is welcoming, and you’ll meet a great group of people along the way.  Please note, the ATG is an amateur dramatics group and all roles are voluntary. 

**Auditions are on Sunday 14 June.**

**Casting**

There are four roles, two men and two women. All four characters are parents, and a playing age of 35–50 is preferred, though we welcome auditions from actors outside that range.
* **Veronica Novak:** A morally certain, controlled woman whose belief in her own decency starts to crack as the evening turns vicious.
* **Michael Novak:** A seemingly affable, practical man whose bluntness and resentment surface as the social niceties fall away.
* **Annette Raleigh:** A polite, tightly wound woman whose composure collapses under pressure, exposing anger, panic and disgust.
* **Alan Raleigh: **A cynical, distracted lawyer who treats the meeting as an inconvenience and grows more openly contemptuous as the conflict escalates.

Performances run on Thursday 27, Friday 28 and Saturday 29 August at Fort Theatre, Bishopbriggs. You’ll need to be available for those dates and for evening rehearsals through July and August.

**To audition or ask any questions, email Patrick Gerard, ATG Drama Convenor, at patrickgerard@myyahoo.com.**

We’d love to see you there.

Ian Puleston-Davies is a Welsh actor, writer, and director best known for his roles as Owen Armstrong in Coronation Street (2010–2015), as well as roles in Marcella, Tin Star, and Pennyworth. An accomplished creator, he co-wrote the BAFTA-nominated drama Dirty Filthy Love (2004) and directed the 2023 feature film Bolan's Shoes featuring Timothy Spall.

His workshop shows actors how to bring their performances to life. How to use all your tools to make your performance real and exciting for auditions and performances. Previous Workshops have had amazing feedback! He really is a

Workshop 24th May 2:30pm-5:30pm 

you can book your place via the link below https://screenplayacting.com/product-category/workshops/

email info@screenplayacting.com for any questions many thanks x

items.text:
Hello everyone! I work for an up and coming creative services company/talent agency called Productive Honey/Swarm LA (https://www.productivehoney.com) and our main focus is to rebel against the current system by only offering non-exclusive deals. 

However, we are still a new company and have a lot to learn, which is where we need help! I am currently looking for casting directors and talent agents who would be interested in hopping on a call or grabbing coffee to talk about your position, what you like about the industry and what you don't like, tips and tricks, and overall advice about entering the casting/agency space.

We are also two co-signs/referrals away to join Casting Networks as an agency, so if any casting directors like what we're about and want to help us out, please let me know!

If interested, please send me your email or you can email me at savannah@productivehoney.com :) Thanks!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES — HOSPITALITY INDUSTRIAL — NON-UNION

Location: Inglewood

Date: Monday, May 11

Time: 1 PM – 4 PM

Rate: $75

Casting for (7) speaking actor roles for a growing hospitality venture.

ISO:
1. **The Veteran Captain (M)**
Late 50s, calm to the point of mystery. He’s flown through everything; storms, system failures, even a rumored hijacking decades ago; but never talks about it. Younger pilots see him as a legend, though his reluctance to embrace new technology sometimes causes friction. Off-duty, he quietly builds model planes with obsessive precision.
2. **The Rule-Breaking First Officer (F)**
Early 30s, sharp, ambitious, and just a little too confident. She’s a brilliant pilot who cuts corners on protocol when she thinks she knows better; sometimes she does. Constantly butting heads with authority, she’s trying to prove she belongs in a space that hasn’t always welcomed her.
3. **The Charismatic Flight Attendant (F)**
Mid-20s, effortlessly charming and always one step ahead of passengers’ needs. They can defuse tense situations with humor and read people instantly; but hide a surprisingly complicated personal life. Dreams of becoming an actor, and treats every flight like a stage.
4. **The Overworked Aircraft Mechanic (M)**
40s, grease-stained and perpetually tired, but a genius with engines. Works night shifts and knows every plane in the fleet like an old friend. Cynical on the surface, but deeply protective of “their” aircraft and the people who fly in them. Keeps a secret notebook of recurring mechanical quirks no one else seems to notice.
5. **The Rookie Flight Attendant (M)**
Early 20s, wide-eyed and eager, fresh out of training. They memorized every safety procedure but struggle with real-world unpredictability—difficult passengers, delays, and crew politics. Over time, their idealism starts to clash with reality, forcing them to grow up fast.
6. **The Veteran Flight Attendant (F)**
Early 50s, impeccably composed, with decades of experience etched into every perfectly timed smile. She’s seen the golden age of air travel fade into budget cuts and packed cabins, and she carries a quiet nostalgia for how things used to be. To new crew members, she’s equal parts mentor and enforcer; she’ll teach you everything, but won’t tolerate shortcuts. Passengers trust her instantly, especially when things go wrong.
7. **The Young Pilot (M)**
Mid-20s, recently promoted from first officer after an unusually fast rise. Technically gifted and deeply passionate about flying, but still learning how to command authority in high-pressure situations. He idolizes the veteran captain and tries to emulate his calm demeanor, sometimes overcorrecting into silence when he should speak up. Off the flight deck, he’s more relaxed; awkward, even; and still adjusting to the responsibility of having hundreds of lives in his hands.

If interested, please submit the following to alex@layoverclub.app:

- Contact information

- Headshot, full body shot, reel

- Resume

Please follow the subject line format of: First Name,Last Name - Role(s) - TLC Shoot

Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/8 .

🔥 CASTING CALL 🔥 new drama series 
THE AUTHORITY .. it will be historically groundbreaking !!! It will be the only drama series in the entire world based off of transit! Bus driving being one of the most dangerous and stressful jobs in the United States! We will touch on every dramatic and traumatic aspect of it! 

Audition link 
https://linktr.ee/TheAuthorityAuditions 

Sunday May 17th and 24th 2p-6p 
@ Zav 27 
12403 Superior Ave 
Cleveland Ohio

🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026  
💸 Free submission (o

Stories beyond borders.

📍 Location: Johannesburg

🎥 Role Type: Background Talent

sharedPost.text:
Lights, camera, action, three of our talented students are joining the cast of a new film! 🎬
We are incredibly proud to announce that Brooke and Eva will be joining Summer-Joules in the upcoming feature film Boo Playing Bella, as production officially begins.
Following the recent auditions and Acting for Screen workshops hosted by Majestic Talent Agency & Majestic Academy of Performing Arts, which welcomed more than 80 young performers, we are delighted that two of our students training with Majestic Academy of Performing Arts have now been cast alongside Summer-Joules who is also a student in this exciting and heartwarming production.
Brooke and Eva will play Summer-Joules’ best friends on screen, making this opportunity even more special, as the girls also share a genuine friendship in real life. Watching their natural bond and friendship come to life on screen is going to truly be wonderful to see.
We are extremely proud of all three girls and feel very fortunate to have been given the opportunity to host the casting process and workshops for such a meaningful and inspiring film.
Congratulations to Summer-Joules, Brooke, and Eva on this fantastic achievement, we cannot wait to follow their journey throughout production.

  #MajesticAcademy #PerformingArts  #TalentAgency  #ActingSchool #FYP  #Chester

items.text:
🚨 NOW SEEKING YOUTH PERFORMERS FOR THE JUNETEENTH TOUR 🚨

The Juneteenth Tour is a multi-city East Coast run featuring performances at festivals, community events, summer celebrations, media opportunities + more during Juneteenth week 🎤✨

We are currently looking for up to 2 additional performers to join Ah’Lia Am’Unique (instagram.com/ahliaamunique) and Ximena P (instagram.com/ximenapryce) on tour.

Artists selected will gain opportunities including:
• Performing in multiple cities
• Regional audience growth
• Digital + physical marketing materials
• Ad campaigns + promo content
• Brand partnership opportunities
• Radio/media opportunities (interviews and possible airplay. We successfully helped get Ah’Lia Am’Unique’s song “Bicycle” featured on Atlanta’s V103 with DJ Greg Street just today!🔥)
• Industry guidance to help grow their brand + revenue streams

Requirements:
• Must be 15 years old or younger
• Must have at least 1 original song
• Must submit music + a performance video
• Must be available for ALL tour dates + TBD group rehearsal dates
• Must have a tour/travel budget
• Do not have to be local, but must be able to be in Atlanta when it starts (group rehearsals and meetings prior to can be virtual)

To be considered:
📧 info@rightpryceent.com

OR

📲 Post/tag/share your music + videos on IG using @RightPryceEnt #TheJuneteenthTour26

Follow Right Pryce Entertainment Group:
instagram.com/rightpryceent/

⏳ Submission deadline: May 15th

CULTURE. ENTERTAINMENT.'

• Do not have to be local, but must be able to be in Atlanta when it starts (group rehearsals and meetings prior to can be virtual)

To be considered:
📧 info@rightpryceent.com

OR

📲 Post/tag/share your music + videos on IG using @RightPryceEnt #TheJuneteenthTour26

Follow Right Pryce Entertainment Group:
instagram.com/rightpryceent/

⏳ Submission deadline: May 15th

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

items.text:
CASTING 📸 do reklamy słodyczy szukamy: kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-40 lat. Łącznie mamy 7 ról głównych (role z tekstem). Fajny, komediowy scenariusz 😉 

Mile widziane wszelkie typy urody, sylwetki oraz różne fryzury, RÓŻNE KOLORY włosów ,  zarosty, wąsy… itp. 

💵 Wynagrodzenie 5000 zł. 
🎥 Zdjęcia: 26.05.2026, w Warszawie; zapewniamy zwrot kosztów podróży;  

‼️ZGŁOSZENIE: 

📧 wyślij w mailu na FILM@FILMTROJMIASTO.PL - z tytułem ,,REKLAMA SŁODYCZE” - podaj: 

🔸 imię nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania 
🔹 numer telefonu 
🔸 krótko opisz swoje doświadczenie reklamowe, filmowe, aktorskie, teatralne itp.
🔹 w załączniku jedno aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki z widoczną twarzą i aktualną fryzurą

‼️ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do wtorku, 5 maja. 

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami mailowo - wyślemy szczegóły oraz informacje co należy wysłać w ramach selftape (będzie to między innymi: video wizytówka + scenka).

items.text:
Circus Performer - Open for New Opportunities! 🎪✨
Professional Circus Performer | 4 Years Experience | Available Immediately

Hello! I am a professional circus artist with 4 years of experience performing in various local shows and national stages. I am currently fully available and seeking new opportunities for shows, tours, festivals, or professional contracts.

My Core Specialties:

• Cyr Wheel: Dynamic and high-energy performance.

• Free Ladder (Ladder Balancing): Expert balance and precision.

• Hat Manipulation / Juggling: Creative and entertaining hat skills.

I am a disciplined, hardworking performer ready to bring a unique spark to your event or circus troupe. Whether you are looking for a solo act or a team player, I am ready to hit the stage!

📩 Get in touch with me:

• Email: abnizersamson7@gmail.com

• WhatsApp: +251953464632

• Telegram: @abenezer_ladder

Status: Available for  international projects.

Feel free to share this post or tag someone who is looking for a professional performer!

#CircusPerformer #CyrWheel #LadderBalance #HatJuggling #CircusJobs #PerformerForHire #EthiopianCircus #AvailableNow

sharedPost.text:
WEEKEND PEŁEN CASTINGÓW – TWOJA SZANSA NA PLAN!
Nadchodzący weekend to idealny moment na przejrzenie najświeższych ofert i wysłanie zgłoszeń. Produkcja wielu projektów – od wysokobudżetowych reklam po kultowe seriale – aktywnie poszukuje nowych twarzy. Poniżej znajduje się zestawienie aktualnych naborów.

REKLAMY I KAMPANIE SPOŁECZNE
Obsada reklamy marki samochodowej (Warszawa/Cały kraj): Poszukiwani są aktorzy w wieku 24–55 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113229

Kampania społeczna (Warszawa/Cały kraj): Produkcja szuka aktorów w wieku 11–60 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113206

Statyści do reklamy (Warszawa): Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 20–60 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113207

SERIALE I PROGRAMY TELEWIZYJNE
Aktorzy do serialu „Trudne Sprawy” (Wrocław/Cały kraj): Poszukiwani są aktorzy w wieku 22–70 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113227

Epizodyści do serialu „Ukryta Prawda” (Warszawa): Poszukiwani są aktorzy w wieku 6–50 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113216

Nowy serial (Rynia): Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 18–60 lat. https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113217

Statyści do serialu (Warszawa): Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 18–60 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113204

Epizodyści do serialu (Warszawa / Toruń): Produkcja szuka mężczyzn w wieku 20–35 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113198

FILMY I PROJEKTY SPECJALNE
Statyści do filmu fabularnego (Warszawa): Poszukiwani są statyści w wieku 25–45 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113203

Statyści do sceny imprezy (Warszawa): Produkcja szuka osób w wieku 18–30 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=113202

ZADBAJ O SWÓJ PROFIL W TEN WEEKEND
Pamiętaj, że uzupełniony i aktualny profil to klucz do sukcesu. Wykorzystaj nową metodę płatności BLIK, odbierz bonusowe miesiące premium i wyślij zgłoszenia do wybranych produkcji. Weekend to najlepszy czas, by zadbać o swoją karierę przed kamerą!

👉 Wszystkie ogłoszenia dostępne tutaj: www.easycasting.pl
